recommendations.title: Safety Last!
recommendations.overview: When a store clerk organizes a contest to climb the outside of a tall building, circumstances force him to make the perilous climb himself.

recommendations.title: A Million Little Pieces
recommendations.overview: A young drug-addled writer approaching the bottom of his descent submits to two months of agonizing detox at a treatment center in Minnesota.

recommendations.title: Nowhere Boy

recommendations.title: Back to Black

recommendations.title: Fifty Shades of Grey
recommendations.overview: When college senior Anastasia Steele steps in for her sick roommate to interview prominent businessman Christian Grey for their campus paper, little does she realize the path her life will take. Christian, as enigmatic as he is rich and powerful, fin

recommendations.title: Shithouse
recommendations.overview: Lonely college freshman Alex has closed himself off from his peers, who all appear to have this whole "college thing" figured out. But everything changes one night when Alex takes a leap and attends a party at Shithouse - a legendary party fraternity

recommendations.title: Akron

recommendations.title: So Young
recommendations.overview: Although new friendships and new love await her, a college freshman discovers that university life is not as simple as she had hoped.

recommendations.title: Lev Yashin. The Dream Goalkeeper
recommendations.overview: An ordinary working class boy, like all his peers, he played football day and night and dreamed of being a striker. But no matter which team he played for - in the yard, at the factory, or in the army - he was inevitably put in goal.

recommendations.title: Summer of '92
recommendations.overview: The 1992 Danish football team competes for the European Championship.
